  • Module

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AppLauncher
    Application entry-point wrapper.
    Author
    Represents an author entity in the Library Management System.
    AuthorDao
    Data Access Object interface for the Author entity.
    AuthorDaoImpl
    JDBC implementation of AuthorDao.
    Book
    Represents a book entity in the Library Management System.
    BookDao
    Data Access Object interface for the Book entity.
    BookDaoImpl
    JDBC implementation of BookDao.
    DBConnection
    Singleton wrapper around the JDBC Connection to the PostgreSQL database.
    LibraryApp
    JavaFX Application subclass for the Library Management System.
    Loan
    Represents a book loan (borrowing record) in the Library Management System.
    LoanDao
    Data Access Object interface for the Loan entity.
    LoanDaoImpl
    JDBC implementation of LoanDao.
    Main
    Bootstrap class for the Library Management System.
    MainController
    JavaFX controller for MainView.fxml.
    Reader
    Represents a library reader (patron) in the Library Management System.
    ReaderDao
    Data Access Object interface for the Reader entity.
    ReaderDaoImpl
    JDBC implementation of ReaderDao.
